extensionDescription.message: Save images from the web to Artist Reference Collection (ARC).

modalHowToSave.message: Hover over an image and click the save button that appears. You can also use the context menu or Alt + right-click.

modalQueueInfo.message: Images go into a queue (up to 50). When you open ARC with Import enabled, the queue is sent to your library automatically.

modalQueueBody.message: The image was added to the queue (up to 50). When you open ARC with Import enabled, the queue is sent to your library automatically.

statusDisabled.message: Import API is disabled in ARC settings

statusQueued.message: Queued — will send when ARC is available

disabledToastBody.message: Enable Import API in ARC Settings → Browser extension.
